articles.description: Pearl Abyss' shares dropped by nearly 30 percent after reviews for Crimson Desert went live last night.

articles.title: Amazon Alexa's UK personality to change with Echo AI update - BBC
articles.description: There has been criticism the Echo has stagnated, while other AI chatbots have become much easier to communicate with.

articles.title: Apple warns iPhone users to update software after mass hacking campaigns - NBC News
articles.description: Apple is encouraging people to update their iPhones in light of new research that has pointed to vulnerabilities in older versions of the iOS operating system.
